title: euphrasia reayensis
intro: Euphrasia reayensis, also known as the Reay's Eyebright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, which is native to the mountainous regions of the Scottish Highlands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are beneficial in treating eye infections and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia reayensis include its ability to reduce eye inflammation, soothe conjunctivitis, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory problems. Euphrasia reayensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat eye and respiratory conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
